The price is never the price.

On a $1.65M home you're really looking at about $117k more, stamp duty, legal fees and renovation, before you get the keys. Know the real total first.

Check yours free at propsight.sg (link in bio).

posts.caption:
HDB flats are pulling about 6.1% gross rent islandwide.
Condos? 3.6%.
The "premium" address is quietly earning you less.
See what your place actually yields, free at propsight.sg

#singaporeproperty #propertysg #hdb #condo #rentalyield #propertyinvesting

That offer you wrote? The bank doesn't care about it.

Your loan and CPF only stretch as far as the bank's valuation. Anything above that, you cover in cash from your own pocket.

So know the number before you sign.
Check yours free at propsight.sg
